title: Learn to Ask Questions — Levels 1 & 2 Combo Pack
tagline: A complete journey from first questions to confident conversations.
description: This gift-ready Combo Pack brings together both progressive levels. Children begin with familiar everyday situations and gradually move towards deeper questions involving problem-solving, values and the world around them.
benefits: Offers progressive question-building across two levels
Encourages curiosity, empathy and confident self-expression

comparison.focus: Ask better questions and speak with confidence
comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: All themes from Levels 1 and 2, including family, school, feelings, safety, nature, community, healthy habits, festivals, problem-solving and values.
